description: Agentic retrieval pipeline where the agent LLM (Opus 4.5) has a loop rewriting the query and retrieving more content (using ColEmbed-VL-8B embedding model), until the agent thinks it has enough candidates to select and rank top-k relevant pages.

nodes.description: LLM Agent with a loop that rewrites original query and calls retrieve tool to get pages. It might decide to stop retrieving more content, and then select and rank top-k relevant pages.
If the query is complex or vague, the agent might decide to call this tool to reason about the query and plan the actions.
Retrieves top-k relevant content for a query (original or rewritten) using an embedding model, in this case, the nvidia/nemotron-colembed-vl-8b-v2 model (late-interaction).
Selects and reranks top-k relevant pages from the pool, retrieved by the multiple retrieval tool calls.

edges.description: Query is vague or complex, and agent calls think tool to reason more.
Reasoning text is returned to the LLM agent.
Agent rewrites the query and calls retrieve tool.
Top-k retrieved pages are returned to the agent.
Selects and rerankes top-k pages among pages retrieved in the many retrieve tool calls.
